name: saas-ai-agent
description: Embeddable JavaScript widget that adds: - a docked input bar (`text field + right-side button`) on the host site - a popup chat for continued conversation - prompt delivery to `https://app.beliv.io/webhook/ai-agent` - live showcase: [https://widget.beliv.io/web-ai-agent/](https://widget.beliv.io/web-ai-agent/)
